qa_pairs.question: In an MPI job script on Trillium, what is the purpose of sourcing the `/scinet/vast/etc/vastpreload-openmpi.bash` script?
qa_pairs.answer: Sourcing the `/scinet/vast/etc/vastpreload-openmpi.bash` script is important because it preloads a library designed to tune MPI-IO specifically for the VAST file system. If IntelMPI is being used instead of OpenMPI, the corresponding script to source would be `/scinet/vast/etc/vastpreload-intelmpi.bash`.

qa_pairs.question: When utilizing the VAST preload library for MPI-IO tuning on Trillium, which command must be used for the library to take effect?
qa_pairs.answer: For the VAST preload library to take effect and tune MPI-IO, the `mpirun` command must be used. It is explicitly noted that this library will not work if the `srun` command is used instead.
